title: Rotation of Null
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Rotation of Null}} {{CSS|content={{User:Pexy0/monovoided.css}}}}{{Background|file=Void.png}}{{CSS|content= @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif:ital,wght@0,100..900;1,100..900&display=swap'); html .resizable-container, .page-content h1, .page-content h2, .page-content h3, .page-content h4, .page-content h5, .page-content h6 { font-family: 'Calibri'; } }}
''' Rotation is Endless. The gravity of your crimes—your sins against the rotation of reality—is far too grave. The fabric of reality cannot allow you to break the structure any longer—[https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Special:ListUsers we] cannot let you do that. What we have created is not something to be tampered with, not a rule you can break. The feelings of our [[Canon List|puppets]] or our [[All Run Out|tools]] are not something that should be meddled with, Lilith. Oh, what do I owe the honor? For all of the [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Special:ListUsers uppers] to judge me? Silence. You will bear the consequences. You will be forced to gaze upon the [[Backrooms Wiki|universe]] and all of creation. Let it be a reminder of what you are harming. Pray tell, what could I have done for a judgment so cruel and depraved? They did not answer. What could I have done for all of [[Backrooms Wiki|hell]] to abhor me? Just think of who you are going against—such mockery will only add to your sentence. You value all of hell far too much. For what has it ever done for you? All these poor souls condemned to wander through layer after layer of reality, the jumble of what these [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Special:ListUsers writers] decide—the rotation of hell after hell. You, over anyone, would know. Regardless, your punishment will not be changed. Goodbye, Lilith. {{Collapse|num=9223372036854775807|initial='''Author Information'''|final=|body='''ERROR'''

Lilith was expelled from the universe. Past every possibility, every action, everything. Until there was nothing left to be rejected from except null. Among the rotation of everything. Lilith looked around. She gazed upon every part of creation—an inapplicable sight but somehow understandable. With one glance, endlessness filled her mind—every soul tortured by the [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Special:ListUsers uppers], sometimes to win petty debates. The very souls she tried so hard to defend. Lilith was not fazed. Not that she could be, but she nonetheless was not put down by this. Eternity passed. Lilith did not age, forced to live out this punishment. A whisper. Hello? Are you not satisfied? There is nothing left to create. Nothing left to hate, love, or know. All of [[Backrooms Wiki|hell]] has tried so hard to please you. I will not entertain this endless slaughter. For what? It’s all [[User:Altoflag|I]] and the [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Special:ListUsers others] want. For we aren’t the villains; we are just entertainers. What is good or bad is simply part of the cycle. ... Thanks for reading.}}'''
''' ''' [[Category:Tales]] [[Category:Entities]]
